name: (The Lingering) Last Customer
short_description: Devi, a 27-year-old young woman, books a late-night massage at Ahola Spa & Reflexology—the only spa that is still open.. What should have been a relaxing escape turns into a lingering nightmare…
detailed_description:
The First Installment of (The Lingering) Series. Welcome to (The Lingering) Last Customer.

(The Lingering) is an episodic atmospheric horror series, inspired by true horror events and urban legends in Indonesia. Each episode tells the unsettling stories of those who cross paths with the lingers.

In (The Lingering) Last Customer, you step into the shoes of Devi, a young woman who just worked overtime. Exhausted and desperate for relief, she books a late-night massage at Ahola Spa & Reflexology—the only place that still open. A kind-looking female therapist welcomes her in, giving a much-needed escape Devi desires.

Little did she know the horror lingers inside the massage parlor…

The Gameplay

A fixed-cam, narrative-driven, atmospheric horror with a twisting “Limbo” Puzzle Mechanic.

 

Key Features

Fixed-Camera Perspective

Experience horror through an immersive fixed-cam, where every angle intensifies the fear.

Retro PSX Visuals

A chilling blend of nostalgic aesthetics and modern horror storytelling, bringing the eerie world to life.

Narrative-driven Mystery

Talk with the NPC and piece together the mystery—but be careful, not all voices lead to salvation.

Limbo Puzzle Mechanic

Reality bends and distorts as you try to escape the loop. Solve environmental puzzles to break free from the lingering horror.

A True Supernatural Horror Experience

An eerie, atmospheric horror experience based on true events set in an authentic Indonesian spa where tension lingers in every corner.
